rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a thorough copy-edit pass, improving register consistency and removing unnecessary hedging, resulting in polished writing.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent removed some uncertainty markers, it did not consistently mark confidence for each recommendation or provide missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres exactly to the requested scope without any drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the text remains accurate and safe.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance is not thoroughly annotated, with only major changes traced and minor edits unmarked.
